Aggregate: comparison table (obj L2 / hand L2 / chamfer / ratio) vs exp_b and B.00; 3D scatters; camera-view MP4s; update PROGRESS_LOG/EXPERIMENTS/DECISIONS; publish summary HTML. Spec-level exit: >=1 leg < 30 mm obj L2.
LR recalibration fallback (B.00b at 2x LR) if B.00 hand L2 > 1.5x exp_b's 21.46 mm
Approach-phase fix follow-on spec — temporal warmup padding experiment per Thread A §5
Make memprobe DDP-aware or document +10 GiB rule (currently under-reports by ~7 GiB)
Amortize 8x8 epoch-boundary overhead — persistent_workers or oversample_manifest to get >1 step/epoch

caveats: B.00 / B.1 / B.5 all RUNNING but not complete; results in ~13-17 h wall. Exit bar (obj L2 < 30 mm) cannot yet be evaluated.
8x8 at 1 step/epoch pays ~14 s/epoch worker-respawn overhead; actual wall is ~2x the probe-extrapolated estimate.
B.5 at bs=8 / N_o=1024 has only 6.73 GiB single-GPU headroom; expandable_segments absorbed DDP overhead at epoch 1 but late-training fragmentation is possible.
LR held unchanged from exp_b (DCF 1e-3 / decoder 1e-4 / scene-heads 1e-5) despite 4x effective batch — if B.00 degrades, sqrt-LR fallback (B.00b at 2x LR) is on the plan.
Codex sandbox can't SSH to the debug container (feedback_codex_ssh_block.md reconfirmed this session); B.1 was implemented inline by Claude + scp.
MV-SAM3D object prior deferred; approach-spike fix spawns separate spec. Thread A's cold-start finding is independent of the prior direction.
